mandates.mandate: Never blind-retry. Always diagnose before retrying a failed step.
The debugger diagnoses; the original agent fixes. Separation of concerns.
Debugger confidence threshold is 0.7 (from global.yaml disciplines.diagnose_confidence_threshold, default 0.70).
Max 2 total attempts: original + 1 diagnosed retry. After that, escalate.
This protocol is NOT opt-in. It triggers automatically on any step failure.

step.title: Capture error context
step.action: Collect: error message, stack trace, failing step number and title, files involved, last successful output, workflow.yaml context.
Mark step faulted in checkpoint with error capture.

step.title: Dispatch diagnosis
step.action: If Debugger agent persona exists at _symphony/lifecycle/agents/debugger.md: load and dispatch with error context. Debugger produces root-cause, affected files, fix recommendation. Debugger does NOT fix.
If no Debugger agent exists (pre-Spec 5): self-diagnose with same output format.

step.title: Validate diagnosis confidence
step.action: If confidence below 0.7: skip retry, escalate directly to user with original error + low-confidence diagnosis.
If confidence at or above 0.7: proceed to step 4.

step.title: Apply fix and retry
step.action: Hand diagnosis to original agent. Agent applies fix. Retry the faulted step.

step.title: Evaluate retry result
step.action: If retry succeeds: clear faulted status, update checkpoint, return PASS.
If retry fails: max 2 total attempts exhausted. Escalate to user with original error, diagnosis, fix attempted, new error. HALT with halted_retry_exhausted.
